titleStmt.title: SII 31.176: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 176. (A.R. No. B 297 of 1937.) BHAṬṬIPRŌLU, REPALLE TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar in the kalyānamaṇḍapa of the Viṭṭhalēśvarasvāmi temple.
It is dated Śaka 1182, Raudri, Pushya, ba. 2, Sunday Makara Sankrānti corresponding to 1260 A.D. 21 December. The day being the Tuesday.

Registers the gift of fifty five sheep for maintaining the perpetual lamp in the temple of Bhōgīśvaradēva at Bhaṭṭiprōlu by principle servant (Bhōgēśvara devaramūla bhṛityuḍu) Śrī Karaṇam Īśāna Peggaḍa for the merit of his parents Panṭipeggaḍa Appana Peggaḍa and mother (name not known). The gift is entrusted to Dēvana bōya and Prōḷe bōya, the sons of Paḷe bōya with the stipulation to maintain the gift lamp by supplying one mānika per day. The engraver of the record is Mallēśvarapeggaḍa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śakavaruṣaṁbulu
1182vagu nēṁṭi rau
dri saṁvatsara puṣyabahuḷa vi
Ādivāramu nāṁḍu maka
ra saṁkrāṁtti nimittamu

na bhōgīśvaradēvara mūla
bhrityuṁḍaina śrīkaraṇamu
paṁṭipeggaḍa Appanape
ggaḍlakoḍuku Iśānapeggaḍa
tamatalli taṁḍriki dharmma

vugānu śrīmadbhaṭṭi
prōli bhōgīśvara dēvara
ku Akhaṁḍavarttidē(dī)
pamunakuṁ beṭṭina
goriyalu 55 vīni

jēkoni paḷebōyani ko
ḍkulu dēvana bōyuṁḍu
prole bōyuṁḍu dama
putrānu pautikamugā
nityamāneṁḍu
nēli lekkanu Āca
ṁdrārkkamunaḍapaṁ ga
la vāru śrīmallēśvara
peggaḍavrālu .
Digital edition of SII 31.176 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
